title: Content brief → article-draft chain never receives product / voice / positioning — drafts come out generic
expected: The draft names the maker's real product value / speaks in their voice, so they'd publish under their own name with light edits.
got: brief.ts and article-draft.ts prompts see only topic + primaryKeyword + free-text audience; no product/brand/voice/positioning resolver on either case (contrast social.ts which DOES take a brand voice). Even the Compare 'positioning' text is dropped before the brief seed.
l2_priority: Generate a real draft for a 'X vs Y' / niche query on demo-app & demo-content; judge whether it names the product's value or reads as fill-in-the-blank slop.

title: Produktová kreativa hardcodes a baby-gear audience + mionelo.cz URL into AI copy, regardless of the actual catalog
expected: Ad/creative copy grounded in the shop's real catalog (product + audience).
got: generate() hardcodes audience 'Rodiče a budoucí rodiče… dětské vybavení' and finalUrl mionelo.cz; product+USPs are grounded but the audience/URL are a different business. Also the module is a Google-Ads RSA/PMax asset tool (30/30 char badges, CSV export) — jargon-heavy for a maker.
l2_priority: On demo-eshop, generate product creative and confirm whether baby-gear audience / mionelo.cz appears for a non-baby catalog.

title: Obsahový engine cluster + decaying-content tables are hardcoded baby-magazine sample data (only volume scales per project)
expected: 'Which of MY pages are decaying / MY clusters to build' — grounded in the user's real site / niche.
got: SAMPLE_CLUSTERS + SAMPLE_DECAY are byte-identical baby-parenting content for every content project; no Search Console / CMS seam wired. The prioritization LOGIC is genuinely computed (rankedClusterStats, decayingPosts) — the data underneath is fiction. Header does label 'Ukázková data'.
l2_priority: Open Obsahový engine on demo-content & demo-app; confirm the same baby-niche clusters render + the 'Ukázková data' label.

title: Distribuce repurposes the HEADLINE, not the article — regenerate() sends {title,url,channels,tone} with NO body
expected: 'One article → channel-native variants' that preserve the article's substance.
got: DistributionModule.regenerate() posts only title/url/channels/tone; repurpose.ts prompt then 'works from the title'. Source article is also hardcoded to SAMPLE_SOURCE (baby-sleep) with no input field, and ContentEngine 'Distribuovat' navigates away without carrying the draft. The per-channel adaptation prompt is good but starved of the body.
l2_priority: On demo-content Distribuce, generate variants and check whether they reflect the article body or only the headline.

title: Data-hungry modules fabricate scaled sample data for a zero-traffic project instead of a teaching empty state; labeling is inconsistent (LTV/Compare labeled, Výkon not)
expected: A zero-data module shows an honest teaching empty state ('no data yet — here's what to do'), or at least a uniform sample-data label.
got: getProjectDataset always scales the sample series → Výkon & CAC→LTV render full fabricated numbers on a project with no users. LTV wears a SampleDataNote; the Výkon page renders none. Knihovna vzorů is the one MODEL empty state (teaches + manual add).
l2_priority: On a genuinely fresh project confirm Výkon shows fabricated numbers with no sample-data banner.

title: Obsah — plán generates GBP post TITLES only, no ready-to-approve post copy — week-of-promo L1-fails for local
expected: A batch of ready-to-approve GBP posts (actual copy) grounded in her real services.
got: content-schedule produces template titles + a scheduling board with NO AI drafting; footer admits copy is a future step. The only drafting surface (Sociální sítě) is the wrong channel (FB/IG/LI/TikTok) and mounts with no project/brand context. Titles ARE catalog-grounded and the scheduling spine is solid.
l2_priority: Confirm Obsah — plán has no post-copy drafting on demo-local.

title: Lokální dominance reputation panel hardcoded to AC/electrical industry for a dental clinic; map pack lists fictional non-local competitors
expected: Reviews/reply context match the business (dental); map names real local competitors she'd recognize.
got: LocalModule businessType hardcoded 'montáž a servis klimatizací' with AC-themed reviews → review-reply prompt gets wrong industry. Map pack uses a fixed 6-name placeholder list (Studio Alfa, Atelier Vega…), none dental/real. Both labeled 'ilustrativní data'. Primary Recenze inbox IS correctly grounded.
l2_priority: On demo-local confirm Lokální dominance shows AC reviews on a dental clinic + placeholder competitor names on the map.

title: Keyless keyword generator is e-commerce-shaped with zero locality modifier — fails locality+intent at the front door for a service business
expected: Locality- and intent-aware service×location query suggestions.
got: sampleKeywordIdeas modifiers are all product-shopping (cena/koupit/eshop/skladem/levně/bio) with no geo template; for a service seed they read as nonsense. The locality-aware targeting he needs DOES exist in Lokální dominance (catalog service×location gaps) — but there's no bridge from a local gap to a content brief, so the strong view dead-ends into the weak keyword tool.
l2_priority: On demo-leadgen, run keyword research for a service seed; confirm no locality modifiers; confirm Lokální dominance gap rows have no brief handoff.

title: Přehled first-run greets a non-marketer with unexplained PNO / ROAS jargon (and no first-action CTA)
expected: A plain-words next step for a beginner on screen one.
got: Guidance card 'růst obratu při udržení PNO. Sledujte ROAS', primaryGoal 'Obrat & PNO', KPI tiles PNO/ROAS — no gloss, no tooltip, no first-post CTA. Exactly the close-the-tab moment for Nikol/Ilona.
l2_priority: Screenshot the demo-eshop Přehled first-run; confirm PNO/ROAS appear with no plain-language gloss.

title: Keyword research foregrounds CPC bid ranges + 'Google Ads Keyword Planner' framing to zero-budget organic users
expected: Organic-only signals; no paid-spend metrics foregrounded for a no-budget user.
got: Every keyword row shows a CPC bid range; empty state/footer advertise 'search volume, competition and CPC' and the Keyword Planner. Mitigated by opportunity-first ranking; CPC doubles as a commercial-intent tell.
l2_priority: Visual-confirm CPC column present on demo-app/demo-content keyword research.

title: Cluster prioritization isn't difficulty/winnability-aware — leans on volume, though the keyword tool already computes competition
expected: 'Which cluster has the best SHOT (winnable intent)', not biggest/least-built.
got: Cluster ranking = completeness asc, volume desc tiebreak; the only numeric column is Objem/měs; no per-cluster competition signal is carried over from the keyword opportunity score.
l2_priority: medium

title: Lead-quality furniture is paid-first (CPL/CPQL KPIs, 'Optimalizovat bidding' next-step) though the organic path stands alone
expected: A funnel usable organically with paid strictly optional.
got: Headline KPIs are CPL/CPQL/junk-sources; funnel leads with Google Ads/Sklik/Meta; both modules push 'Kampaně' as the next action. The winning organic source IS surfaced and best — this is framing, not capability.
l2_priority: medium

title: Lead-reply prompt omits the real service catalog; service context is a 4-branch keyword guess that collapses to a generic label
expected: Reply grounded in what he actually offers, so it reads as the expert.
got: projectTypeFor() is a 5-way string match over the message ('klimatiz'/'elektroinstal'/…) falling back to generic 'poptávaná služba'; the catalog/Offering spine never reaches the reply prompt. The enquiry text itself IS injected (that part is well-grounded).
l2_priority: medium

title: Keyword research grounded only on seed term + URL, not the catalog; keyless demand data is deterministic sample fiction until an Ads account connects
expected: Keyword suggestions grounded in the actual catalog; demand validation reflecting real search data.
got: Keyword engine scales sample ideas off seed length; no catalog read; live Google Ads path only activates with a connected account. Fresh app project also generates only brand queries (empty starter competitors → no 'vs' rows).
l2_priority: low

title: Keyless demo brief hardcodes foreign brand 'Mionelo' + e-shop framing ('Doporučené produkty', 'Bestsellery') into service/content briefs
expected: A brief that reads for the actual business, not a baby e-shop.
got: demoBrief hardcodes '| Mionelo', 'Doporučené produkty', 'Bestsellery'. Only the keyless fallback is off-domain; the live model path (Claude in dev) is fine.
l2_priority: low
scope_note: Keyless-fallback only; in dev a live model is present so lower live impact.

title: First-run overview shows a cross-project PORTFOLIO comparison to a single-shop user (fixture-influenced)
got: listProjects returns all seeded projects; >1 → portfolio branch renders 'Přehled portfolia · napříč N projekty' + blended ROAS + PortfolioCompare. Partly a multi-fixture artifact, but any >1-project user hits it.
l2_priority: low

title: Compare & SEO ranks by winnable opportunity (volume × intent × SERP-gap ÷ difficulty), budget-free, queries synthesized from brand + catalog competitors — no CPC on the surface
l2_priority: Confirm live render + that no CPC/spend appears on the Compare surface.

title: Sociální sítě 'Plán týdne' = true do-it-for-me batch: topics one-per-line → a scheduled week of posts, brand voice auto-derived from catalog+perf+competitors and shown ('Píše na značku'), no ad account
l2_priority: Generate a live week on demo-eshop; confirm output is on-brand, not robotic.

title: Keyword opportunity score is competition/intent-aware (60% volume + 40% inverse competition), Czech intent classifier, plain 0-100 'Příležitost' answers 'which words'
l2_priority: low

title: Cluster + decay prioritization is genuinely COMPUTED (least-complete-first pillar-weighted; decay <-10% YoY worst-first; hub-spoke link-debt) — machinery is senior-grade, only the data is sample
l2_priority: low

title: Gap → brief → draft in one flow; content workspace mounts brief WITHOUT onCreateAds and kampane isn't availableFor content — zero paid push
l2_priority: low

title: Brief + draft are penalty-conscious (SEO limits, keyword-in-3-places no-stuffing, 5-7 H2, FAQ, no invented image URLs) with a real computed E-E-A-T scorecard + pixel SERP truncation
l2_priority: low

title: Lead-reply draft is grounded in the REAL enquiry text (injected verbatim) + captured BANT, not a template; suppresses re-asking known info
l2_priority: Generate a live reply; confirm it quotes/uses the enquiry specifics.

title: Kvalita leadů is a real computed CRM-style signal (per-source funnel, CPL vs CPQL, win rate, velocity, junk flags) that explicitly handles unpaid/organic — organic is the top-quality row
l2_priority: low

title: Recenze inbox drafts specific, grounded, approve-and-send review replies (real review text → reply prompt); Lokální dominance shows concrete service×location GAPS, not a vague score
l2_priority: Generate a live review reply on demo-local; confirm it references the review specifics.

title: Knihovna vzorů is the MODEL empty state — teaches, redirects, offers manual add; and creation modules (keywords/compare/content/social) produce useful output from zero with no budget/audience/connection
l2_priority: low

title: In LOCAL_DB offline mode every AI generation fails with 'Could not load the default credentials' and silently falls back to the template — the offline seam doesn't cover AI usage metering
expected: LOCAL_DB=true (the documented offline path) should make AI surfaces work without Firebase/Google ADC, or fail loudly.
got: src/lib/usage.ts getUserPlan/quota calls firestore.collection('usage').doc(userId).get() unconditionally (no LOCAL_DB guard); with no Google ADC the AI route throws at route.ts:268 ('[ai] generation failed (mode=lead-reply): Could not load the default credentials'). The UI shows NO error — the reply/draft textbox just keeps its non-AI template, which reads like success.
l2_priority: This is itself the L2 finding. Also the reason live AI-output-QUALITY (draft/reply/caption prose) could NOT be judged in this run — see run ceiling.

title: The 'Mionelo' e-shop identity is defined inconsistently across surfaces — a nuts/seeds shop in catalog + Social brand-context, but a baby-gear audience in Product-creative's hardcoded grounding
expected: One project identity everywhere: Mionelo's brand/audience is consistent across every surface that grounds AI.
got: Catalog + Sociální sítě brand-context say 'Značka: Mionelo. Sortiment: Ořechy, Semínka, Sušené plody … 100% natural, Bez soli a oleje' (nuts). Produktová kreativa hardcodes audience 'Rodiče a budoucí rodiče … dětské vybavení' + finalUrl mionelo.cz (baby). Same project, two businesses.
l2_priority: Confirmed live via static capture (nuts everywhere except the product-creative hardcode).

title: Sample-data honesty labeling is inconsistent across surfaces — the 'Ukázková data' banner is on Distribuce/Lokální/Recenze/Obsah-plán/Rychlá reakce/Produktová kreativa but ABSENT on Výkon, which shows the most fabricated numbers
expected: Every surface rendering seeded/illustrative numbers carries the same honest 'Ukázková data' label.
got: Výkon renders full fabricated performance (297k visits, 13.5M Kč, ROAS 5.9×, month-goal projection) with NO sample-data banner; six other modules carry it. The single most authoritative-looking numbers are the least labeled.
l2_priority: Confirmed live.

title: LIVE-CONFIRMED: Sociální sítě 'Plán týdne' brand grounding is real and rich, shown as 'Píše na značku' — auto-derives Mionelo's sortiment/USPs/pricing from the catalog, and is usable without sign-in
l2_priority: Input grounding verified live; output prose quality unverifiable this run (see BM-L2-01 ceiling).
